name: Vault 404 ( Fallout Shelter )
description: WELCOME VAULT DWELLER to your new home!.........FOREVER! Vault 404 is proudly funded by the Vault-Tec AND Arasaka Corporation ensuring you have EVERYTHING YOU NEED to live a FULL LIFE in complete isolation! Vault-Tec ensures our Vault dwellers have a Room of their own, a Green Room, Gym and their very own Bathroom! What more can you need?!?!?!
